mapper.sql: id, sender_id, receiver_id, product_id, content, is_read, create_time
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO message (sender_id, receiver_id, product_id, content, is_read) VALUES (#{senderId}, #{receiverId}, #{productId}, #{content}, #{isRead})
mapper.select: SELECT FROM message WHERE (sender_id = #{userId} AND receiver_id = #{otherUserId}) OR (sender_id = #{otherUserId} AND receiver_id = #{userId}) ORDER BY create_time ASC
SELECT FROM message WHERE sender_id = #{userId} OR receiver_id = #{userId} ORDER BY create_time DESC
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM message WHERE receiver_id = #{userId} AND is_read = 0
